reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio YPF ACA, hacen un descuento extra en la carga de combustible, pero eso genere que haya demoras en la atención por las filas que se arman sobre Av. Beiró.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF ACA service station offers an extra discount on fuel purchases, but this causes delays in service due to the lines that form on Av. Beiró.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXMnV1LVFREAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene combustibles, algunos trámites y taller (consultar por que servicios realizan). Agradable el Shopp.

(Translated by Google)
It has fuel, some paperwork, and a workshop (ask for details on what services they provide). The shop is nice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNnFEMEF3EAE

reviews.comment:
La verdad una mala atención uno paga un servicio tan caro para cuando uno necesita asesoramiento atienden de mala manera me sentí muy discriminada tanto por el personal del ACA que me atendió de forma sospechosa cómo si fuese un delincuente y del personal de seguridad que se quedó  viendo si mí consulta era legítima la verdad son un asco de personal

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, the service was terrible. You pay so much for a service, and when you need advice, they treat you badly. I felt very discriminated against, both by the ACA staff who treated me suspiciously, as if I were a criminal, and by the security personnel who stood there wondering if my inquiry was legitimate. They are truly awful staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXc3RXVHN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Unos irrespetuosos. Ante el cambio de aceite no te dejan permanecer debajo del rodado para inspeccionarlo,  te mandan a tomar un café gratis y en consecuencia uno no sabe qué aceite le colocaron puede ser uno de inferior calidad al no estar presente todo vale! Decepcionado para nada recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Completely disrespectful. During an oil change, they don't let you stay under the car to inspect it; they send you off for a free coffee, so you don't know what oil they put in—it could be inferior quality since you're not there. Anything goes! Disappointed, not recommended at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbThXWVZREAE

reviews.comment:
